reviews.comment:
La atención es buena pero....
Como turista me sorprendí porque había que hacer fila para cargar, no es que me sorprenda hacer fila en una YPF en el interior, eso es más o menos lo usual, lo que me sorprendió es que estaba muy pobremente indicado, de manera tal que tuve que llegar al surtidor para que me pregunten si había hecho la cola y luego me indiquen por dónde ir, aclarando que, para poder hacer la cola tuve que dar un vuelta manzana, muy poco práctico.
Luego los tiempos, demasiada tardanza para completar el servicio...
En definitiva, la experiencia podría ser mucho mejor con mínimos cambios.

(Translated by Google)
The service is good, but...
As a tourist, I was surprised because I had to wait in line to fill up. Not that I'm surprised to wait in line at a YPF station inside the city; that's more or less the norm. What surprised me was that it was very poorly signposted, so I had to get to the pump only to be asked if I had queued and then be directed where to go. They explained that, to get in line, I had to go around the block, which was very impractical.
Then there were the times: it took too long to complete the service...
Ultimately, the experience could be much better with minimal changes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3OXRiM213RRAB
